---
Test
---
!define TEST_SYSTEM {slim} 
!path target/classes
!path target/lib/*.jar


|import                     |
|org.cc.fitnesse.fixture.web|

|script       |Web Fixture                                |
|start Browser|edge                                       |
|open                                                     |
|gib in       |search:input_input              |Button|ein|
|klick        |Button                                     |
|pruefe ob    |Button is a navigation component|vorhanden |
|stop Browser                                             |
